hero.headline: We automate sales and customer support
hero.description: We integrate CRM with messengers, create chatbots and AI assistants.
hero.result: Result: your managers handle 40% more requests
hero.microcopy: After submitting the form, we'll review your case and propose a solution within 24 hours

services.title: We automate the work that slows you down
services.subtitle: Your team gets more done. Your customers get faster service.
services.service1Desc: Your customers get instant answers and support 24/7, without hiring more people.
services.service1Example: Example: WhatsApp bot handles order inquiries, appointment booking, and FAQs
services.service2Title: Leads flow into your CRM without manual entry
services.service2Desc: Every customer from Instagram, Telegram, or WhatsApp becomes a tracked lead instantly.
services.service2Example: Example: AmoCRM or Bitrix24 receives leads from all channels, auto-assigns to sales team
services.service3Title: Repetitive tasks disappear from your workflow
services.service3Desc: Data entry, follow-ups, status updates — all handled by systems that never forget.
services.service3Example: Example: Auto-generate invoices, send payment reminders, update project statuses
services.service4Title: Your existing tools work together seamlessly
services.service4Desc: No more switching between 5 different apps. Everything syncs and updates automatically.
services.service4Example: Example: Custom integrations between your CRM, payment system, and messaging platforms

footer.description: B2B: automation for education, coworking spaces and services. Telegram bots, CRM, AI implementation. First step — free 15-minute consultation.
